name: IHG One Rewards Premier Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 140,000 bonus points after you spend $3,000 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening.

earning_rates.notes: Earn up to 26X total points when you stay at IHG (10x with card, up to 10x member, 6x Platinum).

annual_credits.name: Anniversary Free Night
annual_credits.description: Free Night Award each anniversary (40,000 point cap, with option to top off).

annual_credits.name: Spend Credit
annual_credits.description: $100 statement credit after spending $20,000 each calendar year (plus 10k bonus pts).

annual_credits.name: United TravelBank
annual_credits.description: Up to $50 in United TravelBank Cash annually.

other_benefits.name: 4th Night Free
other_benefits.description: When you redeem points for a consecutive 4-night IHG hotel stay.

other_benefits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck
other_benefits.description: Up to $120 statement credit every 4 years.
